jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Atlas Storage
jobs.content:
About the role

Own the MongoDB Atlas storage tier that powers tens of millions of operations per second across the global cloud-database fleet's distributed query layer.

  • C++, distributed-systems, and high-throughput storage-engine experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Customer Success — Vector Search
jobs.content: Own MongoDB's customer-success strategy roadmap across enterprise-account adoption of Atlas Vector Search, retrieval-augmented-generation rollouts, and AI-platform engagement motion.
